Our Philosophy

Ayurveda, wellness, life.

ayushwellnes was built on a simple idea — that real wellness comes from ingredients your grandmother would recognise, prepared with the discipline of a modern lab.

Every formula starts with classical Ayurvedic texts, is refined with quality-checked herbs, and is bottled without shortcuts. Karna Swasthya, Prakritik Dekhbhal — ear health, natural care — is not just our tagline for Ear Veda, it's how we approach everything we make.

Good to Know

Frequently asked questions

Ayurvedic formulas work gradually with the body. Most customers report noticing a difference with consistent daily use over 3–4 weeks. Individual results can vary.

If you're on any prescription medication, pregnant, nursing, or managing a medical condition, please check with your doctor before starting any new supplement.

Dosage instructions are printed on every pack. As a general rule, take only as directed and avoid exceeding the suggested serving.

Yes — we ship pan-India. Orders are typically dispatched within 24–48 hours of confirmation.

Unopened products can be returned within 7 days of delivery. Reach out to our support team to start a return.
